questions.question_text_full:
Select the correct option that indicates the arrangement of the given words in the order in which they appear in an English dictionary
1. Petitionary
2. Petitioning
3. Petition
4. Petitioners
5. Petitioned
questions.notes: The options are labeled a, b, c, d in the image, mapped to 1, 2, 3, 4 respectively.

questions.question_text_full: Six letters and symbols, H, h, I, @, % and $, are written on the different faces of a dice. Two position of this dice are shown. Select the letter or symbol that will be on the opposite to the one having 'H'.
questions.notes: Only three options (a, b, c) are visible in the image. Option 4 is missing.

warnings: Question 2 is incomplete as it only shows three options (a, b, c) and lacks the fourth option.
